data.raceComments: {"comment":"The Provincial-Midway Final is worth a million dollars and will be run over 1400m. A fantastic series for those horses prepared away from the city. 1. LORD OF BISCAY is a lightly tried 6YO gelding who qualified for this final when winning at Newcastle second up 11 days ago. JMac has picked up the ride, and he will only need the gaps to open at the right time to be hard to beat again. 5. MATCHA LATTE made the most of a change of tactics when leading all the way to score over this trip at Hawkesbury 5 weeks ago, and he has trialled up nicely since then. He, too, has not been over-taxed with racing, and if he can find the top early on from a tricky gate, then he may have too many guns in the run home. 8. OUI OUI OUI rushed her way through the grades, and stepped up to G3 level at Rosehill 3 weeks ago to finish 9th, but only just over 2 lengths from the winner. Stick with her back at this level. 6. BUFFALO had enough late fresh at Newcastle but still held on to win gamely. Each-way.","runners":[1,5,8,6],"exclusive":true}
